rulings.Case Title: DONALD GAUGER et al VS. ALCATEL LUCENT et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION To Compel Deft Ericsson, Inc'S Further Responses To Written Discovery; And To Compel Deposition Of Deft'S Person Most Qualified Custodian Of Records; Requests For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Wednesday, February 16, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Plaintiffs' motion to compel and request for sanctions against defendant Ericsson, Inc. was continued from February 2 at the request of the parties to provide them additional time to meet and confer. If all issues raised by the motion are not resolved before then, by 4:30pm today the parties must send an email to contestasbestostr@sftc.org stating, without argument, the issues in dispute and then appear at the hearing at 9am on February 16. = (220/HEK)
